'''Sylvn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Cerean/Legends|Cerean]] who was the [[Mundi family|daughter]] of [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] and his fourth wife, [[Mawin]].

==Biography==
Born in [[49 BBY/Legends|49 BBY]], Sylvn became impulsive and rebellious at an early age. At the age of six, Sylvn drew a picture in the classroom with an angry face in which the teacher showed to her parents. Mundi and Mawin were worried about Sylvn's development and huge opposition to them. In her pride, she told herself that she was inadequately treated, which reflected her frustration.

Around [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]], Sylvn unknowingly became involved in a smuggling ring involving [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]], one of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] agents, and one of the [[Council of Elders (Cerea)|Cerean Elders]]. When this deal went sour, Sylvn, her boyfriend [[Maj-Odo-Nomor]], and her friend [[Twin (Cerean)|Twin]] were trapped on a freighter carrying 2,000 adult [[divvik]]s along with Ephant Mon. When her father, [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], came to her rescue, Mon threatened to blow them all up. Maj-Odo-Nomor tried to stop Mon, but was shot. Manually opening the outside hatch, Ki-Adi-Mundi managed to save his daughter. Unfortunately, Mon was saved as well, and Jabba proceeded to enslave both Sylvn and her friend, [[Twin (Cerean)|Twin]]. [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]] eventually rescued the duo from being executed during an electrical storm.

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Heroes on Both Sides" /> Sylvn, together with the rest of Ki-Adi-Mundi's family, was killed in a [[Battle of Cerea|devastating battle]] on her home planet between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
